policy: Phase-1 acceptance gate (chunk 8): the COMPLETE expected broken set of fixtures/demo-docs. notes/broken-links.md is deliberate Phase-5 test material (2 broken links + 1 broken anchor); every other fixture link must resolve. Any extra broken link, any missing entry, or any drift in page/text/target/class fails the build. The fixture file is editorially pinned alongside this manifest — change both together, deliberately.
